holdings.infoBox: CRTC is an equity ETF with a total of 230 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 4.96%, NVIDIA at 4.57%, Microsoft at 4.44%, Amazon.com at 4.41%, and Meta Platforms at 4.04%.

overview.description: The Xtrackers US National Critical Technologies ETF (CRTC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is passively managed to hold stocks from developed market countries associated with sectors determined vital to maintaining US national security. A committee selects the stocks based on a proprietary rating system and weights holdings based on market-cap. CRTC was launched on Nov 16, 2023 and is issued by Xtrackers.
infoTable: Solactive Whitney U.S. Critical Technologies Index
